title: Alsophila beyrichiana

The genus Alsophila is part of the division Pteridophyta, which includes ferns and their allies. This species of tree fern is often found in tropical and subtropical regions. intro: Alsophila beyrichiana, also known as the Black Tree Fern, is a species of tree fern native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been reported to aid in the treatment of wounds, fever, and digestive issues.
